name: OpenClaw Watchtower
description: Query Sentry issues, SLS logs, and other monitoring data sources for online service patrol.

baseUrl.description: Sentry API base URL, e.g. https://sentry.io or your self-hosted URL

authToken.description: Sentry Auth Token (requires project:read + event:read scopes)

projects.description: List of Sentry project slugs to monitor

lookbackMinutes.description: How far back to look for new issues (minutes), default 15

maxIssuesPerQuery.description: Max issues to return per query, default 10

sentry.label: Sentry Configuration
sentry.help: Configure Sentry API access for querying issues and stack traces
